creator: gjb@FreeBSD.org
text:
ruby-qmail is a Ruby Qmail library to insert email directly into Qmail.

http://rubygems.org/gems/ruby-qmail

Tinderbox logs can be found here:
 - http://www.glenbarber.us/tb/logs/8.0-FreeBSD/rubygem-ruby-qmail-0.1.1.log
 - http://www.glenbarber.us/tb/logs/7.3-FreeBSD/rubygem-ruby-qmail-0.1.1.log

Fix: shar follows.


Patch attached with submission follows:
